case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR VS SPACE SAVER DESIGNS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC. 12, 2008 BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT;CLERK:F.RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT SPACE SAVER DESIGNS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-19-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-12-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM OF $5000, PLUS COURT COSTS.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-01-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-19-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT PENDING. UPON COMPLETION OF SETTLEMENT, PLFT SHALL FILE A REQUEST FOR DISMISSSAL BEFORE 9/19/07 HEARING. IF NO APPEARANCES ON 9/19/07, SETTLEMENT DEEMED UNSUCCESSFUL, AND JUDGMENT WILL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2007 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAR-12-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK:F.RAYRAY. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT WAS SUBMITTED WITH ORDER FOR COMMISSIONER'S APPROVAL. FEE PAID ($10.00).
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT WAS SUBMITTED WITH ORDER FOR COMMISSIONER'S APPROVAL.$10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2008 - JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES. JUDGMENT ENTERED PURSUANT TO ORDER OF DECEMBER 12, 2007. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPACE SAVER DESIGNS, INC. $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,850.00, NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES.
